name: Crc Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup drained low fat cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cottage cheese and eggs in a bowl.
2. Stir in the milk, rice, and mustard.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour and baking powder.
4. Add the flour mixture to the cottage cheese mixture; stir until smooth.
5. Stir in the corn.
6. Heat a non-stick griddle or frying pan over medium heat.
7. Drop heaping tablespoons of batter onto the hot griddle.
8. Cook until brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
(123 calories per serving) 1 serving=1 Bread exchange 1 Lean Meat exchange
